intended_use: TruPlan enables visualization and measurement of structures of the heart and vessels for pre-procedural planning and sizing for the left atrial appendage closure (LAAC) procedure.
intended_use_full: TruPlan enables visualization and measurement of structures of the heart and vessels for pre-procedural planning and sizing for the left atrial appendage closure (LAAC) procedure.
target_condition: Left Atrial Appendage (LAA) requiring closure procedure
ground_truth: Validated phantoms were used for assessing quantitative measurement output
